title: Chewy Garlicky British Cornmeal Roast
description: A lazySunday British roast that's garlicky, chewy, and surprisingly ketofriendly.

ingredients.name: grated cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: optional for extra flavor and chewiness

instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 °C (400 °F) and line a small loaf pan with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl whisk together the cornmeal, almond flour, baking powder, garlic powder, rosemary, salt, and pepper.
In a separate bowl beat the egg, then stir in the melted butter and warm water until fully combined.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir gently until just incorporated; fold in the grated cheddar if using.
Transfer the batter to the prepared loaf pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
Bake for 30–35 minutes, or until the loaf is golden brown and a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let the roast rest in the pan for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve warm, optionally with a drizzle of herb butter or a light side salad.
